name: compact-for-copilot
description: Context pre-processor and autonomous agent for React. Strip token bloat, fit 3-5x more files into Copilot, and apply autonomous code edits — 100% local and private.

chatParticipants.name: compact
chatParticipants.description: Reads and compresses React files to save tokens. Type @compact <your request> — it will provide token-efficient context and exact code suggestions for Copilot to apply.

languageModelTools.name: compact_search_workspace
languageModelTools.description: Search the workspace for React component and hook files matching a keyword. Returns a list of matching file paths.

keyword.description: A filename keyword or glob fragment to search for (e.g. 'Button', 'useAuth', 'Header').

languageModelTools.name: compact_read_and_compress
languageModelTools.description: Read a React/TypeScript file and return a compressed AST skeleton to understand structure with minimal tokens. CRITICAL: The output is compressed — do NOT generate file patches or edits based on this output. To edit a function, you MUST first call compact_read_exact_function to get the real uncompressed source, then use your native edit tools.

filePath.description: Workspace-relative path to the file to read and compress (e.g. 'src/components/Button.tsx').

languageModelTools.name: compact_read_exact_function
languageModelTools.description: Extracts the complete, uncompressed, raw source code of a specific named function or component from a file. ALWAYS call this before editing any function — never write patches based on the compressed output from compact_read_and_compress.

functionName.description: The exact name of the function, component, or variable to extract (e.g. 'BookingListItem', 'handleSubmit', 'RequestSentMessage').

languageModelTools.name: compact_replace_function
languageModelTools.description: AST-aware surgical replacement. Uses Babel to find the exact byte range of a named function and splice in new code. Only the target function is touched — zero collateral damage to surrounding code or JSX. File is left unsaved for review.

filePath.description: Workspace-relative path to the file to edit.

functionName.description: Exact name of the function or component to replace.

newCode.description: The complete replacement source for the entire function. No placeholders.

scripts.build: npm run build:tsc && npm run bundle:extension
scripts.publish:mcp: npm run build:mcp && cp -r dist compact-mcp-publish/dist && cd compact-mcp-publish && npm publish --access public
scripts.pretest: npm run build && npm run lint
